label: squat
summary: A squat rep is interpreted as a controlled top-to-bottom-to-top cycle with depth, balance, and repeatable tempo.
common_misreads: short clips can hide the first or last rep
coaching_cues: Keep the same stance for each rep.
Control the descent before you drive back up.

label: push_up
summary: A push-up is reviewed as a top-to-bottom-to-top pressing cycle with body-line control and repeatable depth.
common_misreads: camera tilt can change perceived body line
coaching_cues: Keep the camera side-on when possible.
Move with a controlled tempo to make each rep easier to compare.

label: shoulder_press
summary: A shoulder press is evaluated as a bottom-to-top-to-bottom overhead pressing cycle with smooth wrist travel and lockout control.
common_misreads: front-view camera angle can hide wrist depth
coaching_cues: Keep the setup consistent across reps.
Use a controlled finish at the top before lowering again.
